text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that they have knocked out 158 vessels and all mine layers in three days, He also called Iran Bullshit artists for the past 47 years: "158 ships in three days we've knocked out even their mine droppers. They don't…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the USS Lincoln has had a day where it had intercepted 101 missiles in a single day using new technology: "I called the general. He didn't even want—he said, 'We don't really need them. We've got the USS Abraham Lincoln, sir. We don't need him.' You know what we have in terms of technology? We had, one day, 101 missiles going at 2,700 miles an hour aimed at the Abraham Lincoln. 101 missiles. Out of 101 missiles, 101 missiles were shot down. Unbelievable technology. Ten years ago, five years ago, I don't know if that would have been possible. But ten years ago, that wouldn't have been possible." @wfwitness
Reporter: You called the Iranians crazy bastards. Trump: True. Reporter: What is your response to critics? Trump: I don't care about critics.
Trump: God supports the United States. God is good.

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on the Iranian mine threat to the Strait of Hormuz: "And now you tell people who own ships that cost a billion dollars not to worry about the mine. You can do that even just by saying we put mines in the water. So it's…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that they have knocked out 158 vessels and all mine layers in three days, He also called Iran Bullshit artists for the past 47 years: "158 ships in three days we've knocked out even their mine droppers. They don't have any mine droppers anymore. But they put them on other boats and they could drop them. I'm not even sure they have any mines yet, by the way. I'm not sure. I'm personally, they say there might be eight. I don't know. I don't know. I think there might be none because they're very good bullshit artists." @wfwitness
Reporter: Are you willing to end this war with Iran charging tolls at the strait? Trump: What about us charging tolls? We should do it. We won.

Open Source Intel Trump on Iran rescue operation: They're waiting out on this farm without a runway. Wet. Crummy soil. Sand. Mostly sand, wet sand. And it eats planes alive, and we're waiting. And we're saying, I hope that one can land and take off. And they came in like magic, boom, boom, boom, boom, one after another. They came in one after another, but not at the same time. They don't want to come at the same time. They had to come right after each other. They didn't have any room. There was barely any room to land. Tiny little patch of very wet Earth tweet

🇪🇺 The EU is preparing for an energy crisis due to the conflict in the Middle East. In Brussels, a package of measures is being prepared, reports the Spanish El País. For example, discussions are taking place about controlling the air temperature in air-conditioned rooms, encouraging remote work, and restricting air travel. Some members of the bloc are raising the issue of resuming resource purchases from Russia, notes the newspaper. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
